sglang.title: Uodate Dockerfile.gb200 to latest sglang
sglang.author: kyleliang-nv
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Improve the Dockerfile.gb200 build to include latest sglang improvements.
Modifications

Bump sglang version in Dockerfile.gb200 to commit: a167fd0,
this is a work-around because flashinfer v0.2.9rc1 doesn't build for aarch64.
Use sgl kernel 0.2.7
Move NVSHMEM to 3.3.9
pip install mooncak

sglang.title: vlm: optimize tensor transport
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
While extending, a TokenizedGenerateReqInput is expected to be sent between processes (normally TokenizerManager -> Scheduler ).
For mllms, when TokenizedGenerateReqInput carries tensors(e.g., pixel_values), tensor pickling with copy can be expensive.
Luckily, when the sender and receiver

sglang.title: Add nvfp4 scaled mm benchmark.
sglang.author: HydraQYH
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add benchmark for nvfp4 scaled mm.
Since B200 has a powerful nvfp4 tensor core, the execution time of nvfp4 scaled mm kernel is very short. It is likely that performance cannot be accurately measured using triton.testing.do_bench. This is because triton.testing.do_bench uses a pair of cud

vllm.title: Support encoder-only models without KV-Cache
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add support for encoder models such as BERT which don't support a KV cache due to the non-causal attention. vllm.title: [NVIDIA] Explicitly disable shuffled weights for flashinfer blockscale moe fp8 kernels
vllm.author: kaixih
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The latest Flashinfer (PR) introduces a new flag to the trtllm_fp8_block_scale_moe API, which defaults to True. This PR explicitly disables it to restore the previous behavior.
I have verified the perf and accuracy with the tot and we recommend to use flashinfer v0.2.9.
cc. @kushanam @mgoin

vllm.title: [VLM] Support HF format Phi-4-MM model
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Transformers has supported Phi4-MM natively, without scipy requirement. (huggingface/transformers#36939)
Add HF-format Phi-4-MM support, so that we can remove scipy from dependency in the future after deprecating legacy phi4mm implementation.

vllm.title: Refactor: Remove numpy dependency from LoggingStatLogger
vllm.author: skyloevil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR refactors the LoggingStatLogger to remove its dependency on numpy.
The token counts (num_prompt_tokens and num_generation_tokens) were previously stored in lists and summed using np.sum. This has been changed to use simple integer accumulators. This modification simplifies the code,
